A clear description of the technical changes introduced by this PR.

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have followed the **Conventional Commits** standard.
- [ ] If adding a new pattern, I have updated `generator.go`.
- [ ] All CI checks (lint, tests) are passing.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated accordingly (strictly technical tone).
